## Meeting Purpose

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel needs more focused work time; removing him from recurring customer meetings](https://fathom.video/share/BHcMgLY_y5rC-by2Ry69s7KCiok-PEJE?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)

  - [Default.com setup initiated for improved meeting routing](https://fathom.video/share/BHcMgLY_y5rC-by2Ry69s7KCiok-PEJE?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [Team to clean up and streamline calendar invites, removing unnecessary attendees](https://fathom.video/share/BHcMgLY_y5rC-by2Ry69s7KCiok-PEJE?tab=summary&timestamp=1938.0)

### Health Check-in
